title: calibrachoa sellowiana
intro: Calibrachoa sellowiana, also known as the "Small-flowered Calibrachoa", is a species of flowering plant in the evening primrose family. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Calibrachoa sellowiana include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems. Traditionally, the plant is prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or extracts, which are used to treat various health conditions.
